cmd.generate.title: Generate Commit Message
cmd.openOutput.title: Open Output Panel
cmd.openConfig.title: Open Claude Config
cfg.model.desc: Override model for commit generation (leave empty to use `ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL` from Claude Code config)
cfg.lang.desc: Language for generated commit messages. `auto` detects from recent commits.
cfg.format.desc: Commit format. `auto` detects from recent commits.
cfg.maxTokens.desc: Maximum estimated tokens of diff sent to the model. Longer diffs are truncated with diffstat preserved.
cfg.customPrompt.desc: Custom text appended to the system prompt. Use this to add rules (e.g., 'always mention ticket numbers').
cfg.recentCommits.desc: Number of recent commits to analyze for style detection.
